texto: It’s a difficult thing having a heart made of glass
autor: people don’t seem to realize how easily it shatters. How often I’ve swept up the pieces and carefully glued them back together.
explicacao: Citação de people don’t seem to realize how easily it shatters. How often I’ve swept up the pieces and carefully glued them back together. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It’s a difficult thing having a heart made of glass” articula amor, richelle-e-goodrich, making-wishes em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como making-wishes.
